_meta.description: Mneme Ship Design System — Flight Computer Catalog. Computers are Level-2 components that process guidance, navigation, and control data.

computers.name: Analog Flight Computer
computers.notes: Operational amplifiers and mechanical integrators. No memory. Basis: V-2 Leitstrahl.

computers.name: Discrete Transistor Computer
computers.notes: First transistorized guidance. Magnetic core memory. Basis: Atlas LV-3B guidance.

computers.name: Apollo Guidance Computer
computers.notes: First digital computer in crewed spacecraft. Core rope memory woven by hand. DSKY interface. Basis: Apollo program.

computers.name: Integrated-Circuit Flight Computer
computers.notes: First IC-based space computers. Strapdown IMU support. Basis: Saturn V LVDC.

computers.name: Microprocessor Flight Controller
computers.notes: First microprocessors in spaceflight. Software-upgradable. Basis: Viking lander computer.

computers.name: Shuttle General Purpose Computer
computers.notes: Five GPCs in quad-redundant configuration. Magnetic core memory immune to radiation. Basis: Space Shuttle.

computers.name: 32-bit Space RISC Computer
computers.notes: First 32-bit processors in deep space. Basis: Mars Pathfinder, Mars Global Surveyor.

computers.name: BAE RAD750
computers.notes: Industry standard for deep space. Radiation-hardened PowerPC. Basis: Curiosity, Juno, MAVEN.

computers.name: Commercial Multi-Core Flight Computer
computers.notes: Triple redundant with 2-out-of-3 voting. COTS processors with radiation monitoring. Basis: SpaceX Dragon.

computers.name: AI-Accelerated Flight Computer
computers.notes: Neural processing unit for AI copilot. Real-time physics simulation. Basis: Crew Dragon v2, Starship.

computers.name: Quantum-Enhanced Flight Computer
computers.notes: Quantum co-processor for navigation optimization. Conceptual. Basis: DARPA research programs.
